meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use AI-driven debugging to overcome a lack of portfolio. An intermediate checklist for founders using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Lack of a portfolio is a business bottleneck, not a technical one. By leveraging AI-assisted debugging to build complex, high-utility features rapidly, you transform 'no experience' into 'proven execution.' Use Antigravity and Claude Code to iterate faster, fix architectural flaws in real-time, and ship a high-value MVP that commands market authority.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS market is that no one cares about your intent; they care about your output. Staring at an empty GitHub profile while trying to land your first paying customer is a paralyzing feedback loop. You don't need a decade of experience; you need to master the art of rapid execution.

By treating your codebase as a living organism and your AI agents as senior engineers, you can bypass the 'no portfolio' trap. We aren't just writing code; we are debugging the path to revenue. This framework allows you to ship complex features that demonstrate technical depth, proving your value to investors and users alike.

steps.title: Architectural Audit
steps.description: Identify the critical path in your MVP that provides the most value. Use AI to analyze your current code structure for potential bottlenecks before you build.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project architecture for scalability and suggest three refactors to improve modularity for a SaaS MVP.

steps.title: Automated Error Surface Mapping
steps.description: Use AI to simulate edge cases in your authentication or payment flows, creating a robust debugging layer before users even touch the app.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive test suite targeting edge cases in my Stripe integration and user authentication flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate unit tests for auth and payment modules'

steps.title: Intelligent Log Tracing
steps.description: Connect your application logs to the AI environment to identify silent failures that could kill your conversion rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Parse these error logs and identify the root cause of the intermittent checkout failures.

steps.title: High-Velocity Feature Refinement
steps.description: Implement complex features by feeding AI the desired business outcome, then debugging the generated logic against your existing codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a subscription tier logic based on user activity, ensuring no regression on current auth state.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file ./src/subscription.ts --prompt 'add logic for tiered access based on usage'

steps.title: Performance Optimization & Cleanup
steps.description: Strip away bloat and optimize database queries to ensure your MVP feels enterprise-grade, not like a prototype.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my database queries for N+1 problems and optimize for low-latency response times.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'optimize database queries in the services layer'

pro_tips: Treat your AI agent like a junior developer: always provide the context of the business goal, not just the technical task.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to keep track of previous debugging sessions so you don't repeat the same architectural mistakes.
Always ask the AI to explain the 'why' behind a refactor; this builds your own mental model for future manual debugging.
Keep your prompt library version-controlled in a /prompts folder within your repo for consistent AI behavior.
When debugging, prioritize 'state-machine' logic over 'if-else' chains to make the code more predictable for the AI to analyze.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to a staging environment and run a smoke test using your new AI-generated test suite to ensure production stability.
content.conversion_block: Don't let a lack of history stop you from building the future. Your code should speak for itself, and with these tools, your output will outpace those with years of legacy baggage. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

Connect your application logs to the AI environment to identify silent failures that could kill your conversion rates.
Implement complex features by feeding AI the desired business outcome, then debugging the generated logic against your existing codebase.
Strip away bloat and optimize database queries to ensure your MVP feels enterprise-grade, not like a prototype.
